displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 8 [AKA Invasion]
synopsis: Collects Invasion #0-16, which are set six years later than the other material in this period. However, they are alternately known by several different sub-titles, as follows: Star Wars: Invasion (2009) #0-5, Star Wars: Invasion – Rescues (2010) #1-6, Star Wars: Invasion – Revelations (2011) #1-5. Plus, also collects Star Wars Handbook (1998) #2: Crimson Empire and material from Star Wars Tales (1999) #18-19& 21
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 8 [AKA Invasion]
